query: INSERT INTO diagnosticAssessments (courseId, title, description, totalQuestions) SELECT id, 'RLA Diagnostic Assessment', 'Identify your strengths and weaknesses in reading, writing, and language skills before starting the course.', 10 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Math Diagnostic Assessment', 'Assess your current math skills in algebra, geometry, and arithmetic before beginning the course.', 10 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Science Diagnostic Assessment', 'Evaluate your knowledge of biology, chemistry, physics, and earth science before starting.', 10 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Social Studies Diagnostic Assessment', 'Test your understanding of history, government, economics, and geography before the course begins.', 10 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute INSERT INTO diagnosticAssessments (courseId, title, description, totalQuestions) SELECT id, 'RLA Diagnostic Assessment', 'Identify your strengths and weaknesses in reading, writing, and language skills before starting the course.', 10 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-LANG' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Math Diagnostic Assessment', 'Assess your current math skills in algebra, geometry, and arithmetic before beginning the course.', 10 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-MATH' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Science Diagnostic Assessment', 'Evaluate your knowledge of biology, chemistry, physics, and earth science before starting.', 10 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Social Studies Diagnostic Assessment', 'Test your understanding of history, government, economics, and geography before the course begins.', 10 FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SOCIAL';
